about.label: About
about.title: About me
about.intro: A confident developer with 5+ years of experience in professional development
about.sideText1: I have contributed to the development of SaaS platforms in the renewable energy sector, as well as to a large-scale survey management system as part of a European open-source project. These experiences allowed me to work on data-driven applications and complex systems used in real-world contexts.
about.sideText2: In addition, I have built commercial websites and solutions for private clients, adapting to specific needs and delivering practical, user-oriented results.
about.sideText3: My focus is on writing clean, well-tested code and our following industry's best practices. I keep learning and enjoy solving technical challenges. My goal is to improve the product and to deliver a better experience for both clients and end users.
about.closing: Throughout my career, I have maintained a consistent direction, aiming to contribute to meaningful projects

seo.title: Experience – Lothaire Epee | Full Stack Developer Career
seo.description: Discover professional experience across SaaS platforms, open-source projects, and real-world applications with a focus on scalable and reliable systems.

experienceList.summary: Delivered custom web solutions for business and product websites including product launches and online sales. Development of web interfaces focusing on performance, accessibility while constantly creating elegant design over various digital products.
missions: Creating elegant landing pages and design systems
Built reusable UI components
Integration of selling/transaction interfaces
Integration of responsive pages from Figma
Improving accessibility and performance
Working closely with clients
Implementation of animations and transitions
Collaboration with art direction teams

experienceList.summary: Designed and developed API-driven web applications and micro-services (SaaS for the renewable energy sector.
missions: Built reusable UI components
Product configuration for B2B partners
Dynamic pricing, and customer self-service portals with role-based access control (RBAC, OAuth, JWT)
Enabling real-time pricing and consumption monitoring
Multi-step contract onboarding flow and their management for both producers and consumers.
Worked closely with designer and product owner
Use of AI tools to support code development and documentation.

experienceList.company: Centre de Données Socio-Politiques - Science Po
experienceList.summary: Maintained and developed features on Web Panel Sample Service (WPSS), an API-driven web applications for managing large scale samples(+13000 panelists) and surveys in collaboration with the European research infrastructure.
missions: Enabling secure role-based access for both social scientist and panelists
Providing multilingual interfaces to conduct surveys throughout 13 European countries
Ensured data integrity and their regulatory compliance (GDPR)
Automatization of invitation sendings and follow-up messages (emails, SMS)
Maintained component libraries
Tracking of message delivery, failures detection, and response rates monitoring.
Ensure operational stability through ORM-based data management and CI-supported production workflows
Use of AI tools to support code development and documentation.

seo.title: Projects – Lothaire Epee | Full Stack Developer
seo.description: Browse selected projects showcasing full stack development, UI design, and production-ready web applications built for real clients and use cases.

projectList.title: Reusable Executive Portfolio SPA
projectList.summary: Reusable CV and Portfolio component for executive in car insurance company.
description: Design a Single Page Application reusable component for a client to integrate within their existing application, therefore entailing certain specific constraints regarding the technical stack
The task was to build a content-driven porfolio (no hardcoded data) with a minimalist editorialistic like design with smooth animations and a responsive layout featuring a light/dark mode.
Implemented a Single Page Application with 4 client-side routes using React Router ('/', '/about', '/contact') including a 404 handling page

mainImage.alt: Reusable Executive Portfolio SPA main image

projectList.title: Ribelmais Buch
projectList.summary: Website dedicated to the publication and launch of a book, as well as its sale
description: Design and development of a website for a Swiss client to coincide with the launch of their book, including Shopify integration for online management and sales.
The goal was to build a e-commerce website that feels precise, with a minimalistic design as per requested from client.
